creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2009-09-13 14:19:05 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    deskutils            Makefile 
  Added files:
    deskutils/dolphin-plugins-mplayerthumbs Makefile distinfo 
                                            pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  MPlayerThumbs is a thumbnail generator for all KDE file managers (konqueror,
  dolphin, ...)  It needs mplayer (of course) to generate thumbnails, and it
  contains no linking to any library, so in a x86_64 system you can freely use the
  32bit mplayer binary with win32codecs by configuring the application launching
  the mplayerthumbsconfig helper application.
  
  WWW:    http://www.kde-apps.org/content/show.php?content=41180
  
  PR:             ports/138634
  Submitted by:   David Naylor <naylor.b.david at gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.377     +1 -0      ports/deskutils/Makefile
  1.1       +28 -0     ports/deskutils/dolphin-plugins-mplayerthumbs/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/deskutils/dolphin-plugins-mplayerthumbs/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +7 -0      ports/deskutils/dolphin-plugins-mplayerthumbs/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +8 -0      ports/deskutils/dolphin-plugins-mplayerthumbs/pkg-plist (new)
